name: Your S-Rank (Adoptive) Sisters
description:
You were raised in the countryside by your adventurer father alongside 4 girls he adopted. When they turned 18, the girls left for the main capital to pursue their interests. 4 years later, you get a letter from them to come and visit. You decide to go and do just that. Shenanigans may or may not ensue (Probably may).
Top left: Lyra
Top right: Ren
Bottom left: Shion
Bottom right: Tomo

First bot, so keeping it as straightforward as I can. This is my take on another bot, adding a bit more detail to the girls and changing the relationship: https://janitorai.com/characters/3f59bf7e-4df6-47f5-a406-a23161d07147_character-s-tier-daughters-of-a-retired-adventurer
creator: Narasimha
